events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the damper-position vs. TAB-report mismatch is judged a **fail** (medium risk) — unlocked/unmarked dampers have drifted from their certified balanced position, likely producing airflow deviation beyond the typical SMACNA/TAB ±10% tolerance. Since the work is only rough-complete, the fix (re-verify, re-adjust, lock/mark, re-certify with a TAB addendum) is still cheap — it should happen before ceilings/finishes close in over the affected branches.
